privileged_info_summary: This is a CSV-to-HL7 migration task using synthetically generated patient data. The input is a CSV file with 20 patient records (PatientID, FirstName, LastName, DOB in MM/DD/YYYY format, Gender as Male/Female, and Address) stored at /home/ga/legacy_data/patient_roster.csv. The task requires transforming this data into HL7 v2.x ADT^A28 messages with date format changed from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYYMMDD and gender normalized from Male/Female to M/F. The HL7 messages must contain PID segments with correct field mappings: PID-3 for PatientID, PID-5 for Name, PID-7 for DOB, PID-8 for Gender, and PID-11 for Address. Output files are written to /home/ga/hl7_import with unique filenames. The data is entirely synthetic, generated with a fixed random seed (42) for reproducibility, containing 20 patient records with randomly generated names, addresses, and dates.
